rulings.Case Title: MARIA RACQUEL MANZANILLO ET AL VS. CONRAD M. URQUICO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Thursday, February 2, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANTS CAROLE MOLLOY, CAROLE MOLLOY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege facts showing that Carole Molloy, as trustee of the Living Trust has adverse claim to the property; (2) allege facts re: severance of joint tenancy in light of the authorities cited by the Defendant; (3) allege separately a claim for quiet title, or for cancellation of instruments, or both; (4) allege facts re: CCP 761.020(d). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PETER R BERG ET AL VS. AINA STUNZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing And Verified Petition To Compel Arbitration, Request For Stay Of Proceedings, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Thursday, February 2, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT AINA STUNZ'S Petition To Compel Arbitration, Request For Stay Of Proceedings. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff's complaint raises two distinct issues: (1) a dispute over the alleged violation of CC&Rs; and (2) a dispute over the alleged violation of "certain San Francisco ordinances and regulations." (Paragraph 31). Plaintiffs seek a judicial declaration to resolve and adjudicate the controversy. (Paragraph 32). The dispute over CC&R violation appears to be regarding the construction and application of Section 4.2 of CC&R and is subject to arbitration clause. (Plaintiff contends that any transient use is prohibited; Defendant contends that only the transient use of the whole unit is prohibited). Therefore, the petition to compel arbitration on this issue is GRANTED. Parties to meet and confer regarding the schedule for arbitration proceeding. Dispute over the alleged violation of "certain San Francisco ordinances and regulations" is not subject to the narrow arbitration clause in the CC&Rs and the petition is denied as to this issue. The action is stayed pending the resolution of arbitration proceedings. =(501/REQ)
